sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4229" key="a(linh/kteira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλῐ-νήκτειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">νήχω</etym>) fem. as if fr. *<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἁλινηκτήρ</foreign>, <sense id="n4229.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swimming in the sea,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.190</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gaet.</author> </bibl>). [<pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">ῑ</pron> metri gr.]</sense> </entryFree>
